examples.title: Heartbeat Detection
examples.code:
ALGORITHM HeartbeatMonitor
BEGIN
  WHILE true:
    SEND heartbeat TO node
    START timer
    IF response WITHIN timeout:
      RESET suspicion
    ELSE:
      INCREMENT failure_counter
      IF failure_counter > threshold:
        DECLARE node_failed
END
examples.explanation: Implements basic heartbeat checking with timeout thresholds
